  1. model.entity.detectable.entities

Uses of Package
model.entity.detectable.entities

Packages that use model.entity.detectable.entities
Package
Description
model.entity.detectable
 
model.entity.detectable.entities
 
  • Classes in model.entity.detectable.entities used by model.entity.detectable
    Class
    Description
    ControlRoom
    ControlRoom is basically an Interactable that represents an entrance that the Player need have a full pass to get access into and winning the game.
    Furniture
    Furnitures is an Interactable used to search the pass inside, waiting for the percentage gets to 0 before getting the item inside (action helped by the manager) and deactivate.
    Lift
    Entity that represents a Lift platform for the Player to stand on and control.
    Terminal
    Terminal is an Interactable that used to interupt the Play temporarily to get access to it's screen
  • Classes in model.entity.detectable.entities used by model.entity.detectable.entities
    Class
    Description
    Furniture.FurnitureTypes
    Types of Furniture (name, width, height, offsetY, check percent)
